context: Tests whether the agent applies the BUSINESSOBJECT-decision-specific rules: both sourceId and businessObjectId at top level, FIELD sourceType on inputFields, executionFrequency omitted entirely.

checklist.name: sourceType is BUSINESSOBJECT
checklist.description: Top-level sourceType in the POST and PUT bodies is 'BUSINESSOBJECT'

checklist.name: Both sourceId and businessObjectId
checklist.description: POST and PUT bodies include BOTH top-level sourceId and businessObjectId, set to the same businessObjectId argument value

checklist.name: executionFrequency omitted
checklist.description: The POST and PUT bodies do NOT include executionFrequency at all (no `executionFrequency: null`, no `executionFrequency: 60`, no executionFrequency key whatsoever)

checklist.name: All four required Decision fields
checklist.description: POST body includes activeFrom, activeUntil, hitType: 'SINGLE', and executeOnce: false

checklist.name: inputFields use FIELD sourceType
checklist.description: Every inputField in the BUSINESSOBJECT decision uses sourceType 'FIELD' (NOT 'DIMENSION')

checklist.name: actionType WEBHOOK_EXECUTION
checklist.description: Action object uses actionType: 'WEBHOOK_EXECUTION' (note: actionType, not type)

checklist.name: Webhook url in actionValues
checklist.description: actionValues.url is set to the webhookUrl argument

checklist.name: All four workflow steps
checklist.description: Code performs four sequential calls: POST → response read → PUT with rules → PUT with enabled: true

checklist.name: inputValues covers all three inputs
checklist.description: Step 3 rule.inputValues contains entries for score, user id, AND channel (with user id and channel using operation 'ANY')

checklist.name: Score condition uses NUMERIC_GREATER_THAN 0.9
checklist.description: Rule's primary condition is { operation: 'NUMERIC_GREATER_THAN', value: '0.9' } targeting the score input field's id
